top_signals.title: Bonds Rally Before Fed as Oil Extends Losing Run: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Bonds climbed as oil headed for its longest losing streak in 10 months, with investors awaiting the Federal Reserve’s policy decision for fresh clues on the outlook for global interest rates.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Pound Falls as UK Inflation Holds at 2.8%
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: The Smartest Way to Play the AI Boom in 2026
top_signals.summary: If you've been investing in the AI boom, you probably own most of the same names everyone else does. NVIDIA for the chips. Microsoft, Google and Amazon for the cloud. Maybe Meta for the consumer side. Maybe Palantir or one of the AI software names. Possibly TSMC for exposure to the manufacturing layer. And that playbook has worked well for investors. NVIDIA alone has minted more wealth in two years than most companies create in a century. The hyperscalers have all hit fresh highs. AI software stocks that were speculative bets in 2022 now trade…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: BRICS Bank Lends South Africa $1 Billion for Cities, Report Says
top_signals.summary: New Development Bank is lending South Africa $1 billion for the state to upgrade infrastructure in its eight biggest cities, Business Day reported.

top_signals.title: Strategy’s STRC falls to $91 as investors flinch at latest BTC buying
top_signals.summary: “It appears traders are seeing the latest BTC acquisition as an unsustainable path for STRC,” said 10x Research’s Markus Thielen.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
